subcodes.first_line: O true friend! The East hath been illumined and the West hath been perfumed; commotion hath stirred in America and fame hath spread to Africa, as the flames reach unto the horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست حقيقی ، شرق منوّر شده غرب معطّر شده جوش در امريک زد شهره افريک گشت شعله بآفاق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
